title: DRW MD-DRW-506: Avionics Bay Wiring
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-506 Rev A — Avionics Bay Wiring

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1091, P-1094, P-1095, P-1104, P-1105.
4. Drawn by Rowan Ellery, checked by Felix Herrera, approved by Dr. Rhea Voss.
